summary: Tested Screener role feature. All 9 acceptance criteria pass: screener lands on /screening, only Screening nav visible, redirected from /dashboard and /students, indigo role badge, admin unaffected, Screener option in Add User modal role picker.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Screener role feature fully working. Session tokens via mongosh for screener (role=screener) and admin. Role picker in Add User modal is button-based (not HTML select). Screener restricted to /screening only.
